ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the library's functionality */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming languages the library supports */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the library is distributed */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author or organization that developed the library */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* The date when the library was added to the repository */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the library was last updated */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the library has been downloaded */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the library has been viewed */,
  "star_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the library has been starred */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* The URL to the library's source code repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author or organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website associated with the author or organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the author or organization */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the author or organization */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's GitHub profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library that this feature is associated with */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., preprocessing, tokenization, sentiment analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programming_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "version_support" TEXT /* Versions of the programming language supported by the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_languages" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES programming_languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_languages_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, regular user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* The URL to the user's profile page */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* The URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value provided by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library receiving feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* The date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* A brief summary of changes in this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether this is the current version of the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_licenses" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_licenses_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_licenses_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the library */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of library usage */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., viewed, downloaded) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the library */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library the comment pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment made by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* The number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* The number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)
